lanes.label: Source Fidelity
lanes.description: Checks whether source metadata and extracted facts match the cited material.

lanes.label: Interpretation
lanes.description: Checks whether findings support the public claim without overreach.

lanes.label: Limitations
lanes.description: Checks whether caveats, context, and uncertainty are visible near the claim.

lanes.label: Taxonomy Mapping
lanes.description: Checks that staged records are mapped to the intended taxonomy topic.
